title: Other agricultural workers: Before you apply - Canada.ca
content:
Other agricultural workers
Before you apply for your work permit, your employer must get a positive labour market impact assessment (LMIA) . An LMIA is a document from Service Canada that allows an employer to hire a foreign worker through the Temporary Foreign Worker Program.
Once your employer has the positive LMIA, they must give you
- a copy of the positive LMIA
- your job offer letter or contract
You’ll need that information when you fill out your application for your work permit.
